Bash("C:\\Program Files\\MySQL\\MySQL Server 8.0\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u litemall -plitemall123456 litemall --default-character-set=utf8mb4 -e "
SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total,
SUM\(CASE WHEN name LIKE ''%情趣%'' OR name LIKE ''%避孕%'' OR name LIKE ''%润滑%'' OR name LIKE ''%SM%'' OR name LIKE ''%成人%'' OR name LIKE ''%女性%'' OR name LIKE ''%男性%'' OR name LIKE ''%震动%'' OR name LIKE ''%跳蛋%'' OR name LIKE ''%缩阴%'' OR name LIKE ''%延时%'' OR name LIKE ''%香水%'' OR name LIKE ''%精油%'' OR name LIKE ''%护理%'' OR name LIKE ''%器具%'' OR name LIKE ''%飞机杯%'' OR name LIKE ''%倒模%'' OR name LIKE ''%眼罩%'' OR name LIKE ''%手铐%'' OR name LIKE ''%口塞%'' OR name LIKE ''%项圈%'' OR name LIKE ''%皮鞭%'' OR name LIKE ''%束缚%'' OR name LIKE ''%角色%'' OR name LIKE ''%透视%'' OR name LIKE ''%情人节%'' OR name LIKE ''%礼品%'' OR name LIKE ''%保养%'' OR name LIKE ''%车载%'' OR name LIKE ''%吊带%'' OR name LIKE ''%制服%'' OR name LIKE ''%丝袜%'' OR name LIKE ''%内裤%'' OR name LIKE ''%内衣男%'' OR name LIKE ''%内衣女%'' OR name LIKE ''%游戏%'' OR name LIKE ''%卡片%'' OR name LIKE ''%动漫%'' OR name LIKE ''%影视%'' OR name LIKE ''%小说%'' OR name LIKE ''%漫画%'' OR name LIKE ''%音乐%'' OR name LIKE ''%数码%'' OR name LIKE ''%电动%'' OR name LIKE ''%背包%'' OR name LIKE ''%露营%'' OR name LIKE ''%保健%'' OR name LIKE ''%私处%'' OR name LIKE ''%抗菌%'' OR name LIKE ''%增大%'' OR name LIKE ''%按摩%'' OR name LIKE ''%高潮%'' OR name LIKE ''%敏感%'' OR name LIKE ''%蜡烛%'' OR name LIKE ''%家具%'' OR name LIKE ''%娃娃%'' OR name LIKE ''%服饰%'' OR name LIKE ''%套装%'' OR name LIKE ''%座椅%'' OR name LIKE ''%食品%'' OR name LIKE ''%夏季%'' OR name LIKE ''%眼镜%'' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END\) as adult_related
FROM litemall_category;
")
